info.title: Kiflo PRM API
info.description: The Kiflo API allows you to manage your partner relationship management (PRM) platform. Handle partners, deals, leads, customers, payouts, certifications, and more.

200.description: Certifications given to partner team members

post.summary: Give a certification to a partner team member

200.description: Certifications given to the specified partner team member
